title: Nob Hill
writer: Wanda Tuchock, Norman Reilly Raine, Eleanore Griffin
actors: George Raft, Joan Bennett, Vivian Blaine
plot: The owner of a San Francisco saloon yearns to rank among the upper crust of Nob Hill. When he begins romancing a wealthy socialite it looks like he may have his entry into high society. The pretty star of his saloon's show, howeve...
